channel.title: Pattaya Gym Directory - Kids / Youth Sports venues
channel.description: Latest kids / youth sports venues in the Pattaya Gym Directory.

item.title: BOUNCE Pattaya — Trampoline Park
item.description: International trampoline park franchise on 6F Harbor Pattaya Mall. Free Jump arena, slam dunk lane, dodgeball, performance airbag, Mini BOUNCE for toddlers. BOUNCE FIT adult cardio classes. Same building as Deep Climbing + Bean Cow.

item.title: AF Academy
item.description: Football school for children. Coaches with international children's coaching experience. Indoor + outdoor fields.

item.title: Pattaya City Football Academy
item.description: Bronze-level Academy License (Football Association of Thailand). Children ages 6-14.

item.title: Planet Football Pattaya
item.description: Football academy for kids and youth in Pattaya.

item.title: Rusich Club (Russian Football)
item.description: Russian-language football coaching for children ages 5-16.

item.title: Regents International School Pattaya (Sports)
item.description: International school sports programs: basketball, football, swimming, athletics, rugby, cricket. For school students.

item.title: FAST PRO Football Academy Pattaya
item.description: UEFA-A licensed European football coach. Ages 4-15. Two locations. European-style technical + tactical + character training.

item.title: AF Academy Football School Pattaya
item.description: From age 3 — youngest accepted in Pattaya football. Multi-location. Russian/English/Thai. Indoor + outdoor fields.

item.title: JumpZ Trampoline Park (Harbor Pattaya)
item.description: Pattaya main indoor trampoline park. 6th floor Harbor Pattaya Mall. Indoor AC family activity.
